sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75203" key="o)rnew/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρν-εώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n75203.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρνιθώδης</ref></xr>, of a fickle man, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.44c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
